personal_info.name: Antonio Acquavia
personal_info.summary: Professionista IT dedicato con background in AI e Data Engineering. Esperienza nello sviluppo di prodotti Core Banking e gestione di Data Platform.
personal_info.summary_en: Dedicated IT professional with a background in Artificial Intelligence and Data Engineering, complemented by hands-on experience as a Data Engineer and Software Engineer. Over the past two years, I have been deeply involved in developing a Core Banking product, where I have honed my skills in product management and product development.

education.degree: Master's degree in Artificial Intelligence and Data Engineering
education.highlights: Tesi svolta all'estero presso University of Glasgow.

education.degree: Bachelor's degree in Scienze e Tecnologie Informatiche
Abilitazione all'esercizio della professione di Ingegnere

tasks: Constant interaction with Product Management team to define development tasks.
Technical analysis and user stories development.

experience.description: Sviluppo e gestione di Data Platform su Microsoft Azure.
tasks: Development of a Data Platform for a customer using Microsoft Azure.

experience.highlights: Paper pubblicato a DocEng'23: 'Static Pruning for Multi-Representation Dense Retrieval'
tasks: Study of the literature about static pruning applied to inverted indices.
Study of the literature concerning neural IR models.
Design and experimenting of static pruning models applicable to neural models.
The outcome of this thesis has been submitted and accepted as paper at DocEng'23 with title "Static Pruning for Multi-Representation Dense Retrieval".

experience.description: Sviluppo di applicazioni mobile per dispositivi iOS.
tasks: Creation of graphical user interfaces using xCode and Swift.
Usage of REST API to get data from a server and show them in the application.

projects.name: Football Archive
projects.description: Applicazione web full-stack per la gestione di campionati di calcio amatoriali. Consente di creare e gestire campionati, edizioni, fasi e gironi, con visualizzazione di classifiche e risultati delle partite.

projects.name: Secure Messaging
projects.description: Messaging application with a console interface which uses OpenSSL to ensure confidentiality, integrity and authentication to the messages.

projects.name: Convolutional Neural Network for Medical Imaging Analysis
projects.description: Group project for the exam of Computational Intelligence and Deep Learning. The goal is to classify the images of CBIS DDSM dataset to make a breast cancer abnormalities diagnosis.

projects.name: K-Means with MapReduce
projects.description: Group project for the Cloud Computing exam. The goal is to implement the K-Means clustering algorithm in a distributed manner, exploiting the map-reduce paradigm.

interests.detail: Historical novels, thriller, fantasy, historical essays, manga
